race.comment: CRANKY HARRY (18) tried hard but just failed to pick up the in-form Kaluakoi over 1600m at Doomben last start. Takes on a deeper field this time but drops a huge 7.5kgs. Has the pace to overcome a wide draw and is a decent chance at good each-way odds. KING ZEPHYR (12) has been costly for backers this prep. Settled near the tail of a big field before stoking up late to finish second last time out over 1400m at Sandown. Placed in the Weekend Hussler at this level last prep. Will be storming home again. SUN GOD (4) was the barnstorming winner of the Listed Luskin Star first-up at Scone. No placings from four second-up runs is the query. Each-way play. HARRY'S YACHT (5) just missed at Group 3 level a fortnight ago after drawing wide. Big threat from a better gate today.
